description_long: This armchair features a modern, angular wooden frame with a rich, dark brown finish, giving it a mid-century contemporary aesthetic. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a matte, charcoal-gray fabric that appears soft and slightly textured, with subtle tufted button details on the backrest. The armrests are wide, flat, and seamlessly integrated into the frame, sloping downward in a geometric fashion. The legs are straight and sturdy, crafted from the same wood as the frame, providing a stable base. The back of the chair is fully enclosed with wood, and a small metallic label is visible at the center. The overall design is both stylish and functional, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or upscale outdoor seating areas.
description: A modern armchair with a dark wooden frame and charcoal-gray upholstered seat and backrest, featuring angular armrests and subtle tufted details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide seat, tufted backrest, and angular wooden armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped, geometric wooden armrest and the thick, cushioned seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fully enclosed wooden back with a small metallic label at the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the continuous wooden frame and the depth of the seat and backrest.
attribute_armrest_design: wooden and angular, integrated with the frame
attribute_backrest_style: medium-height, rectangular, tufted with subtle buttons
attribute_leg_type: straight wooden legs, integrated with the frame
attribute_upholstery_pattern: solid color with subtle tufted buttons
